subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast clung to the hem of thy bountiful Lord's sanctity! The fragrances that waft from the gardens of sincerity of that Dayspring of divine love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تشبث بذیل تقدیس ربه الکریم نفحاتی که از ریاض خلوص ان مطلع نور محبت الله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
